8.title: 🔧 System and Kernel
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| fields timestamp, content, loglevel, type, syslog.message, syslog.priority, syslog.proc_id, syslog.severity
| filter type == "kernel"
| summarize count()

9.title: 🖥️ Service and Daemon
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| filter type == "systemd" or type == "cron" or type == "sshd"
| summarize count()

10.title: 📡 Network Events
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| filter type == "NetworkManager" or type == "dhcclient" or type == "iptables"
| summarize count()

11.title: 🔐 Auth and Security
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| filter type == "sudo" or type == "audit"
| summarize count()

12.title: 💾 Hardware and Disk
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| filter type == "udevd" or type == "smartd" or type == "mount"
| summarize count()

13.title: 🧩 Application
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| filter type == "nginx" or type == "mysql" or type == "docker"
| summarize count()

19.title: 📝 Events
19.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| fieldsKeep timestamp, loglevel, syslog.message
| fieldsRename TimeStamp = timestamp, `Log Level` = loglevel, Message = syslog.message

21.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| fieldsKeep timestamp, content, log.source, loglevel, syslog.message

27.query: timeseries { sum(log.syslog.type), value.A = avg(log.syslog.type, scalar: true) }, by: { type }

47.title: System Messages
47.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")

48.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log")
| parse content, """LD "RSYSLOG_server=" LD:rsyslogserver SPACE "RSYSLOG_location=" LD:country "LAT=" DOUBLE:latitude SPACE "LOG=" DOUBLE:longitude"""

51.title: ⚙️ Top log producers
51.query:
fetch logs
| filter matchesValue(dt.host_group.id, "logs-loader") AND matchesValue(log.source, "/opt/syslogs/fake_syslog.log") AND isNotNull(rsyslogserver)
| summarize by:{rsyslogserver}, count = count()
| sort count desc
| limit 10
| fieldsAdd rsyslogserver = replaceString(rsyslogserver, ".example.net", "")
